name: There's no Socks
short_description: Have you ever struggled to find the second sock? That's because there's no socks! There's No Socks is a hidden object game with a selection of 4 locations and random socks to find for each of them.
detailed_description:
Have you ever struggled to find the second sock? That's because there's no socks! There's No Socks is a hidden object game with a selection of 4 locations and random socks to find for each of them.

  • 4 different levels
  • replayable with 20 socks out of 60 selected for each play
  • hint system
  • zoom
  • achievements*

*yes, we believe the people who complete the DLC content also deserve their achievements for finishing the content so some achievements are exclusive to the DLC content.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
